arts.sum: Just three points separate the two sides with Eintracht sitting in the lofty heights of third. Freiburg boast eight wins and five defeats, but four of their losses came against sides currently in the...

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'in danger' of £70m Man City transfer hijack after Omar Marmoush decision
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City are reportedly both vying for the services of Eintracht Frankfurt midfielder Hugo Larsson, who is valued at £70m by the German giants.

arts.ttl: Preview: Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Freiburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Bundesliga clash between Eintracht Frankfurt and Freiburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
